coverage: 100% of the reachable node types across the 46-group, 828-node closure.
validation: The browser reproduces the relative three-object structure, welded quad-sphere seed, repeated tight-wrap/dual-mesh deformation, and finalized boolean shell. Structure-preview topology is exact at 8,040 / 9,300, and the authored stochastic bubble layout is 10,272 / 20,480. Blender's BMesh-style Ico Sphere grid, procedural noise, nearest-surface mix, tight wrap, and dynamic triangulation match through the complete pre-Boolean surface. Retaining exact float32 evaluated meshes for the three collection dependencies moves every finalized sweep from 3,290 / 6,584 to 3,303 vertices / 6,610 triangles versus Blender's 3,302 vertices / 4,675 polygons (6,608 triangles), with exact four-decimal bounds. Blender-exact Boolean operands produce 3,301 / 6,606 in the same Manifold solver: the remaining pre-CSG surface drift contributes two vertices / four triangles, while native Blender CSG contributes the opposite one vertex / two triangles. Missing Budokan and Avenir fonts belong to auxiliary label graphs and are not required by the putty surface.
